历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 9037 → 8874 → 9409 → 20083 → 11493. In 2024, there was an abnormal significant shift to 20083 (possibly related to the first batch provincial control line of 505 points for science that year and changes in exam difficulty). In 2025, it significantly recovered to 11493; the 2025 baseline is approximately 11493. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 29 students in 2021, 30 students in 2022–2023, 29 students in 2024–2025, and the 2026 plan is 27 students, a decrease of 2 students compared to 2025 (a reduction of about 6.9%), leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 79th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 75–80 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationally. 4. [Reputation and Popularity] The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 70th overall (average), with medium short video exposure; no abnormal admission records for South China Normal University, indicating relatively stable admissions in Yunnan. Psychology is A+ (top nationally), Marxist Theory is A, Education is A-, and Physical Education is A-, with psychology recruiting in the physics category (psychology/applied psychology), which strongly attracts candidates. 6. [Major Popularity and Environment] Majors like psychology and optoelectronic information are socially popular; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 285,700). The estimated number of physics category candidates is about 229,200 (173,300 in 2025), leading to significantly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the clear recovery trend in 2025 rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the significant increase in the total number of candidates in the province leading to intensified competition, and taking into account the additional competitive pressure from the surge in candidates, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11217, with a range of 10717–11717.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (10717–11717), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings better than 10717, focus on reaching for flagship majors like Psychology (Teacher Training) and Applied Psychology. For rankings near 11717, it is recommended to primarily consider majors like Network Engineering and Information Engineering for a safe application.

历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1643 → 1563 → 1848 → 2561 → 2215, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, it significantly shifted back to 2561, then slightly recovered to 2215 in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is about 2215th place.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 79th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 75–80 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationally; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity total ranking 70th (average), short video exposure medium; no abnormal historical admission records for South China Normal University, indicating relatively stable admissions in Yunnan; Psychology A+ (top nationally), Marxist Theory A, Education A-, Physical Education A-, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines, strongly attracting candidates aspiring to the education industry.

History category candidates are estimated at about 148,700 (112,400 in 2025), leading to intensified competition.
